title: Paracord Gems
description: A Mod That Adds New Tools, Armor, Structures, & Much More!
body:
Use This Link To Get 25% Off on Bisect Hosting & Help Support Paracord Gems

[https://www.bisecthosting.com/curseforge?curseforge_project_id=807583&dl=1](https://www.bisecthosting.com/curseforge?curseforge_project_id=807583&dl=1)

Paracord Gems is a mod that adds new tools, armor, structures & new adventures!

- All Ores In This Mod Are Stronger Than Any Vanilla Materials
- Structures In This Mod Give Players A Rewarding Adventure
- Includes Custom Tools Such As Hammers & A Katana! (Hammers Mine 3x3 Area!)
- Adds New Advancements
- Adds 3 New Armor Sets & 3 New Ores That Spawn Naturaly In Caves, Paracord, Mysterium, Farvain, Paracord Ore Also Spawns In Other Dimensions (Nether & End Dimensions) 

For Help or To Submit Bug Reports Join The Provided Discord Server
